'''marono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oogenotop|oogenotop]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oogenotop|oogenotop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| marono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæreneth|mæreneth]] || [[word:mærenej|mærenej]] || [[word:mærenesh|mærenesh]] || [[word:mærene|mærene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:maroronoth|maroronoth]] || [[word:maroronoj|maroronoj]] || [[word:maroronosh|maroronosh]] || [[word:marorono|marorono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:maronoth|maronoth]] || [[word:maronoj|maronoj]] || [[word:maronosh|maronosh]] || [[word:marono|marono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:marofnoth|marofnoth]] || [[word:marofnoj|marofnoj]] || [[word:marofnosh|marofnosh]] || [[word:marofnof|marofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maronotho|maronotho]] || [[word:maronojo|maronojo]] || [[word:maronosho|maronosho]] || [[word:maronoko|maronoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maronoth|maronoth]] || [[word:maronoj|maronoj]] || [[word:maronosh|maronosh]] || [[word:marono|marono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maronothol|maronothol]] || [[word:maronojol|maronojol]] || [[word:maronoshol|maronoshol]] || [[word:maronokol|maronokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maronothotho|maronothotho]] || [[word:maronojojo|maronojojo]] || [[word:maronoshosho|maronoshosho]] || [[word:maronoko|maronoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maronothon|maronothon]] || [[word:maronojon|maronojon]] || [[word:maronoshon|maronoshon]] || [[word:maronokon|maronokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maronothoro|maronothoro]] || [[word:maronojoro|maronojoro]] || [[word:maronoshoro|maronoshoro]] || [[word:maronokoro|maronokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
